creator: dsh@vlink.ru
text:
Update HTML-Mason to 1.0 version.

How-To-Repeat: 
diff -Nru p5-HTML-Mason.orig/Makefile p5-HTML-Mason/Makefile
--- p5-HTML-Mason.orig/Makefile	Tue Jan  9 23:14:00 2001
+++ p5-HTML-Mason/Makefile	Fri Feb  2 10:53:59 2001
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	HTML-Mason
-PORTVERSION=	0.89.6
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-0.896
+PORTVERSION=	1.0
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	HTML
diff -Nru p5-HTML-Mason.orig/distinfo p5-HTML-Mason/distinfo
--- p5-HTML-Mason.orig/distinfo	Tue Jan  9 23:14:00 2001
+++ p5-HTML-Mason/distinfo	Fri Feb  2 10:54:23 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (HTML-Mason-0.896.tar.gz) = 5b9d0f654066137ec0d05862c06ccbcc
+MD5 (HTML-Mason-1.0.tar.gz) = b3c06efcfe5612d4ac0cdef7e992d2f4
